title: Support chat: fix admin→customer delivery (dbg146)
description:
PipeShare support chat now delivers admin messages to customers reliably. The bug was in the customer accept flow: the 1s message poll was scheduled while the invite consent modal was still open, so isChatComposerLive() returned false and the poll timer never started. Inbound sync (poll + fetch) is now separated from composer/send gating — receiving messages no longer depends on the send box being enabled.

dbg145 UI polish (avatars, display names, connected system line, theme tokens) is unchanged. Poll remains 1s during active sessions with immediate sync after send.

Who is affected: Horizon admins and customers using PipeShare support chat on the OVH private server. Frontend-only fix — deploy client-portal static assets (dbg146 cache bust). No backend code change required for this fix.
changeLog: Fix customer chat poll never starting after accepting invite (admin→customer delivery).
Split isChatSessionActive (inbound sync) from isChatComposerLive (send only).
Defer scheduleChatPoll until after invite consent modal closes.
Reschedule poll when active session detected but timer missing.
dbg145 UI retained: avatars, names, connected message, theme styling.
Cache bust dbg146 (portal runtime + PipeShare/PipeSync manifests).
